headline: Walmart Has Rewarded Patient Investors: A Prospective Dividend King’s Long-Term Payoff

headline: Interlink Commerce Approved as Official Walmart Marketplace Solution Provider, Signaling a New Era for Mid-Market Sellers
summary: Interlink Commerce, a long-standing specialist in EDI integration and data automation, today announced it has been formally approved as a Walmart Marketplace Solution Provider — a designation reserved for a curated group of technology partners vetted to build on top of Walmart's Marketplace APIs. headline: How Barrière is betting on vitamin patches to shake up the supplement industry
summary: Vitamin patch brand Barriére told CNBC exclusively that it is on track to double its revenue in 2026, projecting $10 million total. This comes as the brand lands a 1,700 store deal with Walmart and rolls out the first ever supplement patch for lactose intolerance. Watch the video to learn more about how the company is trying to disrupt the supplement industry and what challenges it could face in the process.

headline: Maryland Pricing Ban And BTS Tie Up Shape Walmart Outlook
summary: Maryland has become the first U.S. state to ban surveillance-based dynamic pricing in grocery retail, directly affecting Walmart and other large chains. The new rule restricts retailers from using individual consumer data to adjust in-store prices. At the same time, Walmart is launching the exclusive ARIH Western-Korean fusion food and beverage brand nationwide, in partnership with Paldo, hy, and BTS. Walmart is also expanding fresh and health-focused ranges, reinforcing its role as a key...
